title: Software Engineer, Data and APIs, Quantum AI

revision_priority: Add an honest Rust anchor in the most relevant backend/system bullet and surface Rust in Skills only if it is grounded in that experience.
Rewrite the Summary into the required 3-sentence format and lead with backend/systems signal instead of the analytics-transition framing.
review.revision_instructions: Make the resume passable for the Google Quantum AI SWE JD by applying the smallest high-leverage rewrite that fixes both structure and fit. 1) Rewrite `## Professional Summary` into exactly 3 full sentences, each starting with a bold header in the form `**Header:**`. The first sentence should lead with backend/systems identity and C++/distributed-systems strength; the second can summarize infrastructure and production delivery; the third should use a high-value cognition header such as pattern recognition or systems judgment. Remove the current "Transitioning from Analytics" framing from the opening. 2) Add one truthful Rust usage point in the most relevant section, ideally TikTok or another backend-oriented bullet. The Rust mention must be anchored in real work, not a standalone skill claim. After adding that evidence, include Rust in `## Skills` under Programming only if the bullet supports it. 3) Remove bold formatting from modifiers and ownership adjectives such as `team-maintained`, `existing`, `internal`, `intern-owned`, and `team-owned`. Keep bold only on technologies, metrics, and sanctioned emphasis. 4) Preserve the existing company/title/date/location strings exactly as written, and do not delete C++ or the existing backend/data narrative. 5) If no real Rust experience exists, this draft should be retargeted to a different JD; do not invent Rust.
